name: What kind of money can I get for a back injury from construction scaffolding collapse?
description: Medical, lost wages via comp; pain/full losses via lawsuit—often $100k+.

mainEntity.name: What kind of money can I get for a back injury from construction scaffolding collapse?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, lost wages via comp; pain/full losses via lawsuit—often $100k+.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Compensation includes workers' comp medical bills/wages plus third-party damages for pain, lost income, future care if negligence proven.** Values vary by injury severity, fault, wages[3][4]. **Key factors:** 1. Workers' comp: 66% wages, medical. 2. Third-party: full economic + non-economic damages. 3. Permanent disability boosts value. 4. Utah 4-year limit. No exact formula—cases settle for $100k+ often. Track all losses; lawyer calculates fair value using medicals/experts.
